title: PerceptionOutput
description: Validated output contract of the Perception Layer. Every LLM response from the Perception layer must conform to this schema before being passed to the Decision layer.

intent.description: Short description of what the user wants

entities.description: Key concepts or named entities extracted from the query

requires_memory.description: True when user references past conversations or personal facts stored in memory

requires_tools.description: True when current LLM knowledge alone cannot answer — live web search or URL crawl needed

examples.intent: Find latest AI regulations in India
